# pexip_infinity_mjx_exchange_autodiscover_url (Resource)

Manages an MJX Exchange Autodiscover URL in Infinity. An Autodiscover URL is used by the OTJ Exchange Integration to discover Exchange Web Services endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_mjx_exchange_autodiscover_url" "example" {
  name                = "Corporate Autodiscover"
  url                 = "https://autodiscover.company.com/autodiscover/autodiscover.svc"
  exchange_deployment = pexip_infinity_mjx_exchange_deployment.example.id
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `exchange_deployment` (String) The OTJ Exchange Integration this Autodiscover URL belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of this Exchange Autodiscover URL. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `url` (String) The URL used to connect to the Autodiscover service on the Exchange deployment. Maximum length: 255 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description of this Exchange Autodiscover URL. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the MJX Exchange Autodiscover URL in Infinity.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the MJX Exchange Autodiscover URL in Infinity.
